title: function problom ----return and elseif
poc: CREATE FUNCTION test(i integer) RETURNS integer BEGIN IF i = 1 THEN RETURN 1; ELSEIF i = 2 THEN RETURN 2; ELSEIF i = 3 THEN RETURN 3; ELSE RETURN 4; END IF; END;
CREATE FUNCTION te(i integer) RETURNS integer BEGIN IF i = 1 THEN RETURN 1; ELSEIF i = 2 THEN RETURN 2; ELSEIF i = 3 THEN RETURN 3; END IF; END;
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of ELSEIF in function return
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id integer PRIMARY KEY, value integer NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 10), (2, 20), (3, 30), (4, NULL);
CREATE FUNCTION test_func(i integer) RETURNS integer BEGIN IF i IS NULL THEN RETURN -1;
SELECT test_func(value) FROM test_table WHERE id = 4;
